title: Tristagma lorentzii
intro: Tristagma lorentzii is a plant species in the Amaryllidaceae family, commonly known as a type of wild onion or lilyturf. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Tristagma lorentzii include alkaloids, saponins, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Tristagma lorentzii is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in the production of essential oils and salves to treat skin conditions and wounds.
